name: Atlantic Alliance
description: Strong economy and production. Excels at building and sustaining large armies.

specialAbility.name: Arsenal of Democracy
specialAbility.description: Factories produce +1 unit per turn. +1 IPC per factory owned.

name: Eastern Coalition
description: Masters of defense. Infantry hold the line while armor counterattacks.

specialAbility.name: Deep Battle Doctrine
specialAbility.description: Infantry defend at +1. Defenders in home territory get +1 to all rolls.

name: Pacific Union
description: Swift and mobile forces. Strike fast, capture quickly, consolidate.

specialAbility.name: Lightning War
specialAbility.description: All land units get +1 movement. Tanks can blitz through 2 territories.

name: Southern Federation
description: Resourceful and adaptable. Cheaper units and terrain advantages.

specialAbility.name: People's Army
specialAbility.description: All units cost 1 less IPC. Defending in owned territory: first casualty is ignored.
